## Pillar model refresh

Annual refresh (`docs/pillar-model-refresh-2026.md`) recommended:
- L37.1 add (DORA 2026 "developer experience")
- L53 split (signing vs supply chain per ASVS 5.0)

Both deferred per ADR-113 Option C — no active cycles without defect signal.

## Next quarterly coverage report

**Date:** 2027-01-01 (Q4 2026 close)
**Cron trigger:** `0 16 1 1,4,7,10 *` (Jan 1, Apr 1, Jul 1, Oct 1)
**Generator:** `tools/pillar-coverage-audit/audit.sh`

## Decision log — Q3 2026

- **No active cycles launched.** ADR-113 Option C (organic maintain-only) remains in force.
- **No Option A activation.** No 3-consecutive-weekly chaos-weekly failures; no fleet-wide SLO violations.
- **No Option B activation.** No CI-minute cost alert (still measuring).
- **No Option D activation.** No new external standard published that maps to a missing pillar domain.

The fleet remains in sustainment mode per ADR-113. v39+ will continue Option C unless one of the three Option A/B/D activation conditions fires.

Refs: v38 Option C, ADR-113, cycle-28 sustainment, `tools/pillar-coverage-audit/audit.sh`
